_notes: Maps Mercury deposit names -> Cotto account, so unreferenced lump payments reconcile to AR. Matched by case-insensitive substring against the deposit description/reference/note. account_merge collapses accounts that pay together. non_ar = deposits that are NOT customer payments (prizes, refunds, founder transfers). Add an entry whenever a new payment source appears; NEVER guess an org - flag it for Kendall.
_consignment_note: Consignment accounts pay on units sold, so deposits arrive WITHOUT a matched invoice — banked>invoiced is EXPECTED and must NOT be flagged as overpayment. Match is against the mergeAcct account name.

resolved_facts.talafood5645: Butterfield (TRADEMARK-confirmed previously; deposit amounts match Butterfield invoices). NOT Fairway.
resolved_facts.marginedge: Sagaponack General Store — MarginEdge manages Sag's AP (verified email 6/2 + payment 6/9 for COTTO-1048).
resolved_facts.la_grocere_llc: The Shelf (legal entity La Grocere LLC). CONSIGNMENT account — pays on units sold, so deposits arrive WITHOUT a matched invoice (e.g. $3,501 on 2026-03-06). banked > invoiced is EXPECTED here, NOT overpayment; never flag The Shelf as overpaid.
resolved_facts.nimbus: Kendall's FORMER commercial kitchen (no longer used) — deposits are refunds, NOT customer AR.
resolved_facts.fairway_wakefern: Fedele Stella (Wakefern). Invoiced 6/17; NO payment received yet — all Fairway AR is genuinely open. Butterfield + Fairway are separate.
